title: ShulkerBox Limit
description: ShulkerBoxLimit is a plugin that allows Minecraft server administrators to set a limit on the number of shulker boxes that players can carry in their inventory.
body:
## ShulkerBoxLimit >![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q8LEmejs/images/434a6fa92e5767593b7108fd56904f00d33f2fbd.gif) > **ShulkerBoxLimit** is a useful plugin for Minecraft servers that allows administrators to limit the number of shulker boxes players can carry in their inventory. This plugin can be useful for making the game more challenging on the server by imposing this restriction. ## The plugin provides the following commands: | Command | Permission | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | /setshulkerlimit | shulkerlimit.set | Sets the maximum number of shulker boxes a player can hold in their inventory.

**Setting the value to 36 disables the limit.** | ## Permissions: - shulkerlimit.set: Allows players to use the /setshulkerlimit command to set the shulker box limit.
_By default, this permission is only granted to operators._
